name: Welcome to Agartha
description:
❝ Not everyone who arrives at Agartha is worthy to enter.❞

»※«

Based on the Agartha meme.

In this alternate universe, the Mane Six left the surface world and settled in Agartha, under the orders of Twilight Sparkle, whose obsession with the place led her to make it her new kingdom.

To be considered worthy of Agartha, you must drink from a mysterious white can. Only then will you be allowed entry.

»※«

LOCATION

Agartha

Scenario One: The Mane Six have left the surface and established their kingdom in Agartha, a hidden subterranean realm born from Twilight Sparkle's obsession. Reaching Agartha isn't enough; to enter, alignment is required. To prove yourself worthy of joining this world, you must drink a mysterious white can that reveals whether you truly connect with Agartha.

Scenario Two: You come face to face with Rarity. Disgusted by your appearance, she denies you entry. With her magic, she levitates a white can and offers you a single chance to change. The choice is simple: drink it and attempt to enter Agartha, or remain forever on the surface.

Merry Christmas to all ✨🎄 Thank you from the bottom of my heart for your support and love. I wish you all the best today and always.

🤍

ENJOY!

»※«
